reasoning: Gen-0 authored Clawbot. The 2drive+1arm+1claw allocation pairs a front_omni+rear_standard drivetrain with a single front-mounted arm carrying a claw_grasper end effector; the 7:1 arm gear ratio on a 200rpm cartridge trades speed for the torque needed to lift and grasp game objects. The drivetrain and manipulator are modeled as two connection groups. Capability estimates (reach_mm, max_grip_force_N, max_pull_force_N, com_height_mm) are research-grounded starting figures for a VEX-class build at this gearing; predictive.grab carries the starting grasp prediction (grip_force_N 14.7, duration_s 1.2) that the Replay/Synthetic telemetry will correct.
